name: E-commerce: Successful Login
description: This test verifies that a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the shopping page.
descriptionHtml: This test verifies that a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the shopping page.

browser = version=136.0.7103.25> @allure.title("E-commerce: Successful Login") @allure.description("This test verifies that a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the shopping page.") @allure.feature("Authentication") @allure.story("As a user, I can log in with correct credentials") def test_login_successfully(browser): """Verifies that a user can log in successfully and is redirected to the shopping page.""" with allure.step("Initialize page and Page Objects"): page = browser.new_page() login = LoginPage(page) with allure.step(f"Log in as user: {correct['email']}"): login.login(username=correct['email'], password=correct['password']) with allure.step("Verify that the shopping cart page is displayed"): > expect(page.get_by_text("SHOPPING CART")).to_be_visible() E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: hidden E Call log: E - LocatorAssertions.to_be_visible with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for get_by_text("SHOPPING CART") E 9 × locator resolved to
